Steam launched this app with <b>Proton C: Steam launched this app with Proton Compatibility mode enabled, a configuration that may introduce potential instability to the app.
<b>Do not</b> ever enable 'Proton Compat: Do not ever enable 'Proton Compatibility' mode on the Steam Deck for this app. It will cause the app to not launch.

This will download the artwork for all x: This will download the artwork for all xCloud shortcuts. If you saved custom artwork for any xCloud shortcuts, it will be overridden. Continue?

To fix this, on Steam go to <b>Propertie: To fix this, on Steam go to Properties > Compatibility and select Linux Runtime. If Linux Runtime is already selected, toggle it off and then back on again. Its possible that a restart will re-enable proton compatibility mode, if this happens, you may need to click 'Delete Proton Files' as well.
If this app ever fails to launch, its be: If this app ever fails to launch, its because Proton has been enabled. To fix it, on Steam go to 'Properties > Compatibility' and select 'Linux Runtime' or uncheck the compatibility checkbox altogether. Once enabled, its possible that a restart will re-enable proton compatibility mode, if this happens, you may need to click 'Delete Proton Files' as well.

Afterward, reopen this app.

Some devices may require Steam Input to: Some devices may require Steam Input to be disabled for controllers to work properly. If input isn’t working, try disabling Steam Input for the XBPlay app in Steam settings.
